details.test: Task 1: Save cheapest red Ferrari 1960s photos as favorites
Task 2: Create public collection and add affordable Ferrari photos
Task 3: Add standard prints to cart and proceed with standard shipping
Task 4: Create Le Mans racing collection with landscape photos
Task 5: Select three affordable standard prints and continue to checkout
Task 6: Purchase cheapest qualifying Ferrari standard print
Task 7: Create slideshow and reorder slides
Task 9: Update viewing preferences to mid-century dark theme
